title: echinolaena trinii
intro: Echinolaena trinii is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the Indian lotus or the water lotus. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Echinolaena trinii include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Echinolaena trinii are often made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in water, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a paste to treat various ailments.
